AppraisalCreateRequest.description:
Items may be supplied structured, as a raw EVE paste, or both — but at least
one must be non-empty. The paste is parsed and name-resolved server-side. The
combined item count (structured + paste) is capped in the use case; the bounds
here are the cheap first line of defense (ADR-0014, EVE's 1000-item contract).
AppraisalCreateRequest.title: AppraisalCreateRequest

LocationCreateRequest.description:
Add a drop-off location. For an NPC station the name is resolved server-side
from the SDE (any supplied name is ignored); for a structure — which has no SDE —
the name from the structure search is required.
LocationCreateRequest.title: LocationCreateRequest

ReprocessBreakdownOut.description:
How a reprocess-priced ore line breaks down (ADR-0026): the minerals it yields
plus any sub-batch leftover priced at the ore's own market price.
ReprocessBreakdownOut.title: ReprocessBreakdownOut

RulePutRequest.description:
The full rule state for a target (the target comes from the URL). `PUT` is an
idempotent create-or-replace, so this is the complete representation.
RulePutRequest.title: RulePutRequest

SessionUser.description: The authenticated user returned by /me and /login (API DTO).
SessionUser.title: SessionUser

StructureAuthorizeRequest.description: The OAuth callback payload completing the structure-access grant.
StructureAuthorizeRequest.title: StructureAuthorizeRequest

StructureAuthorizeResponse.description: The SSO URL the SPA redirects to, to grant structure-market access.
StructureAuthorizeResponse.title: StructureAuthorizeResponse

StructureSearchResult.description: A structure the authorizing character can access, matched by name.
StructureSearchResult.title: StructureSearchResult

StructureTokenStatus.description: The corp's structure-market authorization status (never the token itself).
StructureTokenStatus.title: StructureTokenStatus

schema.title: Response List Appraisals Api V1 Appraisals Get

post.description:
Begin login: mint state + PKCE (stashed in the session) and return the EVE
authorization URL for the SPA to redirect to.

delete.description: Log out: clear the session cookie.

post.description: Complete login: validate the OAuth state, exchange the code, open a session.

replace.
